title: Crunchy Warm Australian Dum Pilaf
description: A fresh and crunchy comfort dish featuring a blend of dumplings, palm sugar, and dairy-free friendly ingredients for an authentic taste of Australia.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix palm sugar and water until dissolved. Set aside.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add dumplings and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add broccoli florets and sprinkle with cilantro. Pour the sugar syrup mixture over the vegetables. Stir gently to combine.
Transfer dumpling-vegetable mixture to an oven-safe dish. Sprinkle sesame seeds evenly over the top.
Bake for 15 minutes or until the tops are golden brown. Serve warm.
